title: Discourse Markers & Linking Language
topics: spoken · written · contrast · addition · result · position
description: Diskurzní markery — spojky a přechodové výrazy pro plynulý text.

quiz.sentence: The results were positive. ___, the cost was too high. (contrast)
She studied hard. ___, she passed with distinction. (result)

tasks: 1. Rewrite this paragraph adding at least 5 discourse markers:
2. Write a paragraph arguing a point, using markers from each category
3. Read a quality English article and highlight all discourse markers you find
